promptMessages.selectedPromptDescription: Selected prompt will be updated. You can view versions in the
promptMessages.name: Name
promptMessages.newPromptDescription: A new prompt will be created in the
promptMessages.typeOrClickToAddVariable: Type {{ or click here to add variable

promptMessageActions.modelConfigurationDescription: Please configure a model and provider before improving the prompt. Select a model from the dropdown above.
promptMessageActions.loadPromptDescription: You have unsaved changes in your message field. Loading a new prompt will overwrite them with the prompt's content. This action cannot be undone.

promptMessagesVariables.defaultDescription: Detected variables in your prompt (e.g., {{variable1}}) will appear below. For each one, select a field from a recent trace to map it — including image fields like input.image_url or output.image_base64. These mappings auto-fill the variables during rule execution.
promptMessagesVariables.defaultErrorText: Template parsing error. The variables cannot be extracted.

providerDialog.deleteConfigurationDescription: This configuration is shared across the workspace. Deleting it will remove access for everyone. This action can't be undone. Are you sure you want to proceed?
providerDialog.noProvidersAvailable: No providers available for this environment

bedrockProvider.providerNameDescription: A unique identifier for this provider instance (e.g., "Bedrock us-east-1").
bedrockProvider.apiKeyDescription: Click <link>here</link> for instructions on how to create a service account and assign the correct permissions.
bedrockProvider.modelsDescription: Comma separated list of available models. Example:
bedrockProvider.modelsListDescription: Comma separated list of available models. Example:

cloudProvider.pipelineModeDescription: Chat Completions API is the standard endpoint. Responses API enables agentic tooling features (e.g. stateful tool loops, reasoning summaries) on models that support it.

customHeadersField.customHeadersDescription: Custom providers may require additional headers beyond the API key. Add them here as key-value pairs.

customProvider.providerNameDescription: A unique identifier for this provider instance (e.g., "ollama", "vLLM", "LM-Studio").
customProvider.urlDescription: Use `{model}` as a placeholder in the URL if your gateway expects the model name in the path — Opik substitutes the selected model at request time. The model name is interpolated raw, so values containing `/` (e.g. HuggingFace-style names) will become extra path segments.
customProvider.apiKeyDescription: Custom providers may not require an API key, depending on your server setup. Learn more in the <link>documentation</link>.
customProvider.modelsDescription: Comma-separated list of available models. Example:
customProvider.queryParametersDescription: Appended to every outgoing request URL. Some gateways require a version parameter such as api-version=2024-08-01-preview.
customProvider.authHeaderNameDescription: If set, the API key is sent as {name}: <key> in addition to the default Authorization: Bearer header.
customProvider.suppressDefaultAuthDescription: Turn on only if your gateway rejects requests that include Authorization: Bearer.

ollamaProvider.providerNameDescription: A unique name for this Ollama instance (e.g., "local", "cloud", "production").
ollamaProvider.urlDescription: Important: URL must end with /v1 for OpenAI API compatibility. For local Ollama: http://localhost:11434/v1. For remote: http://ollama-test:11434/v1 or your server URL with /v1 suffix.
ollamaProvider.apiKeyDescription: Most Ollama instances don't require an API key. Only add one if your instance is configured with authentication.
ollamaProvider.modelsDescription: Comma-separated list of available models. Use "Discover Models" to auto-populate this field.
ollamaProvider.customHeadersDescription: Optional custom headers for authentication or configuration.
ollamaProvider.urlRequiredDescription: Please enter the Ollama base URL first
ollamaProvider.connectionFailedDescription: Unable to connect to Ollama instance
ollamaProvider.noModelsFoundDescription: No models are available on this Ollama instance
ollamaProvider.failedToFetchModelsDescription: Unable to retrieve models from Ollama

vertexProvider.clickHereDescription: for instructions on how to create a service account and assign the correct permissions.

promptImprovement.yourInitialPromptDescription: This is your initial prompt. Optional instructions can guide improvements, or we'll optimize it automatically.
promptImprovement.improvedPromptDescription: This is your generated prompt, created with the selected model ({{modelDisplayName}}) and parameters. It's editable.
promptImprovement.generatedPromptDescription: This is your generated prompt, created with the selected model ({{modelDisplayName}}) and parameters. It's editable.
promptImprovement.instructionsDescription: Write your instructions in plain language. We'll turn them into a best-practice prompt that you can review and iterate on.
promptImprovement.generatePromptPlaceholder: What do you want your AI to do?
promptImprovement.improvePromptPlaceholder: What do you want to improve (e.g., tone, length)
promptImprovement.generatedPromptPlaceholder: The generated prompt will be shown here, ready for you to review and edit
promptImprovement.promptCutOff: The generated prompt was cut off due to token limits. Please try increasing the max_tokens setting in the model configuration or use a shorter instruction.
promptImprovement.noContentReturned: The model did not return any content. Please try again or adjust your instructions.

addMediaPopover.enterImageUrl: Enter image URL or template variable
addMediaPopover.enterVideoUrl: Enter video URL or template variable
addMediaPopover.enterAudioUrl: Enter audio URL or template variable
addMediaPopover.pleaseEnterValidUrl: Please enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL
addMediaPopover.maxItemsExceeded: You can only add up to {{count}} {{type}}

mediaTagsList.videoPlaybackNotSupported: Your browser does not support video playback.
mediaTagsList.audioPlaybackNotSupported: Your browser does not support audio playback.
